headline: PROVE EVERY MILE STAYS IN RANGE
subheading: Risk-based route mapping and seasonal temperature profiling that hold up to MHRA scrutiny.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial visualisation of a global pharmaceutical cold-chain shipping lane, a luminous teal and cyan route line arcing across a softly stylised dark navy world map, dotted origin and destination nodes glowing with subtle green accents, faint contour rings marking transit and customs handover points along the path, a delicate translucent temperature waveform threading beneath the route showing seasonal peaks and troughs held within a calm in-range band, ghosted geometric insulated shipping carton and a slim circular data-logger gauge floating as semi-transparent layered elements, fine grid lines and concentric monitoring sensor pulses, deep navy gradient background with volumetric depth and soft premium glow, clinical-luxury aesthetic, cool precise authoritative atmosphere, layered depth of field, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
